_disclaimer: UNOFFICIAL derived analytical crosswalk. References FATF Recommendation numbers/topics (not the copyright-restricted FATF text). Shows each Recommendation's UN treaty / Security Council basis (a fixed human-curated mapping) above the national columns, then lists curated corpus provisions tagged with concepts relevant to each Recommendation's subject; NOT legal advice, NOT an assertion of adequate implementation, and NOT a claim of legal equivalence between the UN instrument and any national provision. Every national provision is a human-reviewed curated tag that traces to an authoritative text hash.
source: UN treaty basis: fixed curated mapping (scripts/build_crosswalk.py UN_BASIS). National columns: curated concept tags (scripts/concepts.py) resolved to provision labels via the structure layer
